name: Frijoles De Olla
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Dry beans (such as pinto, California pink or black)
recipeInstructions:
1. Run the beans through your hands to remove any small stones or pieces of earth.
2. Rinse the beans twice in cold water and drain well.
3. Place the beans in a pot and cover with enough hot water to come at least 3 inches above the beans.
4. Add 1/2 teaspoon salt, the sliced onion, and lard to the pot.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
6. Continue cooking until the skins of the beans are soft. Season to taste with additional salt if needed.
7. Cook until the beans are very soft and the broth is soupy.
8. The beans will be best eaten the day after cooking, as the flavor matures.
9. This recipe makes about 3 1/2 cups.
